reasoning: Your main limiter is the poor lactate clearance and underdeveloped aerobic base. This workout addresses these issues directly by focusing on over-unders, which are crucial for improving sustained efforts on climbs like the Alpine Loop. Your last ride showed a significant period of recovery, so we'll ease into this intense session with controlled intensity.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Start with 6 minutes at 201-218W, then 3 minutes at 242-256W. Repeat this over-under structure 4 times. These watt targets will help improve your fatigue resistance and mirror the efforts needed for the key segment on the Alpine Loop.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
